2606.14269.title: ScoreGate: Adaptive Chunk Selection for Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Dual-Score Statistical Fusion
2606.14269.paper_summary: Fixed-cardinality retrieval injects a constant top-K chunks into the generator regardless of query complexity, causing over-retrieval for narrow queries and under-retrieval for compositional ones. We describe ScoreGate, a lightweight score-space decision mechanism that controls retrieval cardinality at inference time using two scores already produced by the standard pipeline: bi-encoder similarity s_i and cross-encoder reranker score r_i, with no additional model inference calls required. Its core insight is that cross-encoder affirmation can rescue semantically relevant chunks that bi-encoder retrieval ranks poorly due to vocabulary mismatch -- a failure mode unaddressed by fixed-K or single-score thresholding. On MS MARCO (200 dev queries), ScoreGate achieves MRR@10 = 0.401 with 35% fewer retained chunks than Standard Top-K. On an internal benchmark (n=300, Fleiss' kappa=0.87), ScoreGate observed zero false positives (95% CI [96.4%, 100%]) at 97.77-99.34% recall, with 34.8% fewer tokens per query and only 31ms added latency. Results on both MS MARCO and real-world production traffic suggest that adaptive retrieval cardinality can improve retrieval efficiency without degrading retrieval quality.
2606.14269.paper_summary_zh: 固定基數檢索無論查詢複雜性如何，都會將一個固定的前K個區塊注入生成器，這導致對於狹窄查詢的過度檢索以及對於組合查詢的不足檢索。我們描述了ScoreGate，一種輕量級的分數空間決策機制，該機制在推理時使用標準管道已產生的兩個分數來控制檢索基數：雙編碼器相似度s_i和交叉編碼器重排序分數r_i，無需額外的模型推理調用。其核心見解是，交叉編碼器的肯定可以挽救由於詞彙不匹配而被雙編碼器檢索排名較低的語義相關區塊——這是一種固定K或單一分數閾值未能解決的失效模式。在MS MARCO（200個開發查詢）上，ScoreGate達到了MRR@10 = 0.401，保留的區塊比標準Top-K少35%。在一個內部基準測試（n=300，Fleiss' kappa=0.87）中，ScoreGate觀察到零假陽性（95% CI [96.4%, 100%]），在97.77-99.34%的召回率下，每個查詢的標記數少了34.8%，且僅增加了31毫秒的延遲。MS MARCO和真實世界生產流量的結果表明，自適應檢索基數可以提高檢索效率，而不降低檢索質量。
2606.14269.author: Karamvir Singh et.al.
